basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released the official Graphic Designer Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a B.E./ B.Tech. or an equivalent qualification and 4 years of experience in the creative design industry can apply online on or before 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B. Tech or any equivalent, 4 years of experience in the creative design industry
qualification.details: Graphic Designer: B.E / B. Tech or any equivalent with 4 years of experience in the creative design industry. Experience in UX/UI design, data analytics and 3D animation is a plus.

salary_details.details: Graphic Designer: Rs. 21,500/- to Rs. 40,000/- Pm (Based on experience)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Madras Graphic Designer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Graphic Designer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_madras: B.E / B. Tech or any equivalent, 4 years of experience in the creative design industry

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Graphic Designer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras Graphic Designer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graphic Designer: B.E / B. Tech or any equivalent with 4 years of experience in the creative design industry. Experience in UX/UI design, data analytics and 3D animation is a plus.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Graphic Designer: Rs. 21,500/- to Rs. 40,000/- Pm (Based on experience)

rows.event: Last Date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization recruiting for?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) is recruiting for various positions, including Graphic Designer posts. This is a great opportunity for eligible candidates to join a prestigious government institution.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Graphic Designer. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience are encouraged to apply for this role at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Graphic Designer post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Graphic Designer post in this recruitment drive. Interested candidates should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria before applying for this single position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for IIT Madras Graphic Designer recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the IIT Madras Graphic Designer recruitment is Online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website of IIT Madras within the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for the Graphic Designer position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for the Graphic Designer position is 28 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the Graphic Designer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.E / B. Tech or any equivalent degree with 4 years of experience in the creative design industry. Experience in UX/UI design, data analytics, and 3D animation is a plus.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Graphic Designer post at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The salary for the Graphic Designer post ranges from Rs. 21,500/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month, based on experience. This is a contractual position at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates belonging to General/OBC and SC/ST categories are exempt from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Graphic Designer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Graphic Designer position includes shortlisting of applications, followed by a Test/Interview, and finally Document Verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be selected.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF on the official website of IIT Madras. A direct link to the notification is also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for easy access.
